query: SELECT id, contactName, ghlContactId, ghlCallId, teamMemberName, duration, status, classification, propertyAddress, callType, callOutcome, createdAt FROM calls WHERE contactName LIKE '%Alex%Martin%' ORDER BY id DESC;
